notes: New bosses: Magician and Leon, each with class-level scaling skills and a 3rd skill unlocked at Boss Level 6.
New challenge: Dopamine Challenge, a Dice Card random-mode gauntlet.
New achievements: Magical Cycle, Boss Slayer, Boss Ripper, Boss Hunter, Hooked and Stacked Up.
Dice Card: type upgrade icons are now dicelike and coloured by their rarity (Bronze, Silver, Gold).
Dice info panel now lists active Dice Card buffs (Spotlight, Investments, etc.) and Combanity roll details.
Giant Hunter Dice Card now inflicts only 50% of its bonus damage against bosses.
Bosses now summon minions 5 class levels lower (min. Class 1) than the parent; minions now scale like general dice while bosses keep their own exceptions.
Dice descriptions now react to class levels, and Transcendence/boss skill text was clarified.
Fixed newly-spawned minions hanging the return-to-sender process during battle.
Fixed Transcendence Dice 6-pip form not having grid-wide (infinite) range.
